description_long: This is a porcelain vase with a classic bulbous body and a long, narrow neck that flares outward at the rim. The surface is adorned with intricate blue floral and vine motifs, characteristic of traditional Chinese blue-and-white ceramics. The patterns are densely packed, with large peony blossoms and scrolling foliage wrapping around the body and neck. The rim features a decorative band with a repeating wave or cloud motif, adding to the ornate appearance. The glaze is glossy, giving the vase a smooth and reflective finish. The overall craftsmanship suggests it is both decorative and functional, suitable for display in refined urban environments.
description: A glossy porcelain vase with blue floral and vine motifs on a white background, featuring a bulbous body and flared neck.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large peony blossom and dense blue vine patterns on the rounded body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a different arrangement of floral motifs and more visible scrolling foliage.
description_view_2: Another side view with a prominent peony and slightly varied vine placement compared to other views.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a similar floral and vine motif, with the pattern wrapping seamlessly around the vase.
